title: SessionPlanMentoringProfile
description: Mentoring session plan per Irby (2018): developmental, long-term relationship, focuses on growth and network. Mentee typically selects the mentor.

long_term_goal.description: Developmental goal over months/years (not a specific KPI)

focus_area.description: e.g., 'Professional identity + network exposure', 'Career transition', 'Leadership development'
